title: Wild Crops
description: This Mod adds Wild Crops of the vanilla like to your World!
body:
Wild Crops brings untamed versions of vanilla crops into your world!


Wild carrots, potatoes, beets, and wheat that grow naturally spawn on grass.
They drop seeds/items like their farmed counterparts but spawn in the wild, adding realism to your survival worlds.

Perfect, if you can't find a village near you, just look for these Wild Crops, each crop will yield a small amount, yet enough to get your so needed farm going! 


***

## **Support the work**

If you enjoy what I create, supporting the page helps me spend more time on updates, polishing features, fixing issues, and creating new content for future releases.

Every bit of support helps keep development going — thank you for making the next update possible.
